summary: Verified stream timeout fix implementation. Code review confirms: (1) stream-handler.js sends real 'keepalive' SSE events every 8s at line 88, (2) stream-client.js handles 'keepalive' silently at line 101, (3) onStreamRecovery callback is properly wired in Dashboard.jsx for both sendMessage (line 1645) and executePlan (line 1825). Frontend loads correctly, login works, project creation works.
critical_code_review_comments: stream-handler.js line 85-93: Heartbeat sends real SSE 'keepalive' events (not comments) every 8 seconds - CORRECT implementation
stream-client.js line 101: 'keepalive' case handler is silent (just 'break') - CORRECT, no UI impact
stream-client.js line 111-131: Stream-end safety net detects missing 'done' event, waits 3s, then calls onStreamRecovery - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line 1645-1680: onStreamRecovery in sendMessage() retries 3 times with 2s delays, fetches saved messages/files from DB - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line 1825-1859: onStreamRecovery in executePlan() has same recovery logic - CORRECT

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login works, dashboard loads, project creation works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stream timeout fix is verified at code level. The fix adds: (1) Real keepalive SSE events every 8s in stream-handler.js, (2) Silent handling of keepalive in stream-client.js, (3) Auto-recovery via onStreamRecovery callback that fetches saved messages/files from DB when stream ends without 'done' event. The real test of this fix is during long builds (>60s) where proxy timeouts occur - this cannot be easily simulated in testing but the code implementation is correct.

stream_recovery_sendMessage.implementation: 3 retry attempts with 2s delays, fetches messages/files from DB, shows toast on recovery

stream_recovery_executePlan.implementation: Same recovery logic for plan execution

login_flow.note: Supabase email/password auth works with test credentials

project_creation.note: Project creation via Creative Brief works

ui_verification.dashboard: PASS - Loads correctly with Creative Brief form
ui_verification.project_cards: PASS - Project cards visible at bottom of dashboard
ui_verification.project_workspace: PASS - Opens correctly when project selected

notes: The stream timeout issue is a proxy-level problem (60s timeout cuts SSE connections). The fix ensures: (1) Keepalive events prevent idle connection closure, (2) If connection still drops, frontend auto-recovers by fetching saved data from DB. This cannot be easily simulated in testing but code implementation is verified correct.
